title: Incorrect result with aggregation by temporary table
poc: CREATE TABLE t1 ( a INTEGER, b VARCHAR(1) );

SELECT
t2_alias.a,
SUM(t1.b) AS field2
FROM
t1
JOIN ( SELECT * FROM t2 ) AS t2_alias ON t1.a = t2_alias.a
GROUP BY t2_alias.a
HAVING t2_alias.a <> 3 OR field2 < 5;
key_bug_features: Aggregation with temporary table in old join optimizer
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 ( a INTEGER, b VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL, c DATE DEFAULT NULL );
CREATE TABLE t2 ( a INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, d FLOAT DEFAULT 0.0 );
SELECT t2.a, SUM(COALESCE(t1.b, '')) AS total FROM t1 JOIN t2 ON t1.a = t2.a GROUP BY t2.a HAVING t2.a IS NOT NULL OR total < 5;
